---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/athenkosi-nkonyeni-1482a8154
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ankonyeni
    - icon: link-45deg
      text: R-bloggers
      href: https://www.r-bloggers.com

---
Hi, I’m Athenkosi Nkonyeni.

I write about things I'm interested in, especially around data standards, data modeling, computer science and digital transformation.

This blog is an outlet for what I'm thinking about and learning. I use it to document ideas, experiments, and lessons I want to remember and build on over time.
